summary: Notion AI is accelerating enterprise readiness through rapid API enhancements—especially multi-value filtering and status property support—and expanding its sales, security, and customer success teams globally. Concurrently, new repositories like 'skills' and 'pulumi-elasticstack-sdk' signal strategic investments in AI agent capabilities and infrastructure-as-code integrations for complex deployments.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.18.0 adds multi-value filters for select, status, and multi_select properties
signals.insight: Enables richer, more flexible data querying and dashboarding in Notion AI-powered workflows—directly improving competitive differentiation against Airtable and Coda for enterprise automation use cases.

signals.title: New repo 'skills': Notion skills for agents
signals.insight: Signals a foundational shift toward modular, reusable AI agent capabilities—potentially enabling third-party developers to extend Notion AI as an agentic OS, threatening Microsoft Copilot Studio and LangChain-based platforms.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.14.0 adds status property support in API endpoints
signals.insight: Unlocks native workflow state management (e.g., 'In Review', 'Approved') in automations—critical for ITSM, HR ops, and compliance use cases where Notion competes with Jira Service Management and ClickUp.

signals.title: Hiring Application Security Engineer, AI Security
signals.insight: Demonstrates proactive investment in AI-specific security controls—addressing growing enterprise concerns about hallucination, prompt injection, and data leakage, thereby strengthening trust versus less mature AI-native competitors.

signals.title: Multiple global Account Executive roles: Mid-Market, Enterprise (UK, DACH, AMER), Commercial
signals.insight: Aggressive global sales expansion—especially in EMEA and APAC—indicates imminent push into regulated, high-ACV enterprise segments, directly challenging Confluence+AI and Microsoft Loop in digital workplace contracts.

signals.title: New repo 'pulumi-elasticstack-sdk': Generated Pulumi SDK for Elasticstack Terraform provider
signals.insight: Suggests deeper infrastructure integration strategy—enabling customers to deploy and manage Notion AI alongside observability, logging, and search stacks (Elastic Stack), reinforcing hybrid-cloud enterprise deployment viability.

signals.title: Hiring Product Marketing Manager, IT Solutions
signals.insight: Indicates focused go-to-market motion targeting IT decision-makers—signaling intent to position Notion AI as a secure, compliant alternative to shadow-IT tools in regulated industries.

signals.title: Hiring Manager, Scaled Customer Success & Enterprise CSM roles
signals.insight: Confirms scaling of post-sales infrastructure to support complex enterprise adoption—reducing churn risk and increasing land-and-expand potential against incumbents with entrenched CS organizations.
